global.description: The ad features a mix of text and graphic elements centered around a vibrant blue background.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Central graphic element
elements.description: A large rectangular shape in the center, possibly a placeholder for content.

elements.label: Secondary graphic element
elements.description: A smaller rectangular shape positioned slightly above the center, likely another content placeholder.

elements.label: Overlay graphic element
elements.description: A large rectangular shape overlapping with other elements, possibly for additional content.

elements.label: Top decorative shape
elements.description: A narrow vertical shape at the top, adding visual interest to the ad.

elements.label: Bottom graphic element
elements.description: A small circular shape located towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Central circular element
elements.description: A small circular shape positioned in the center, possibly for emphasis.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold text at the top reading 'FluxStream UGC', prominently displayed.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: Text in the middle section stating 'Watch what's trending New hits every week', clearly legible.
elements.text_content: Watch what's trending New hits every week

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button-like text at the bottom saying 'Get offer', inviting user interaction.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, bright and modern, FluxStream UGC, trending content.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: FluxStream UGC, Watch what's trending, New hits every week, Get offer
